NONINVSV_VNTLTR_ADMSN_CD O0110G1A Therapies: Non-Invas Mechanical Ventilator (Admis) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received a noninvasive mechanical ventilator days one through three (on admission) of becoming a resident of the facility. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
